top_signals.title: Rubio Says He's `Very Confident' in Getting an Iran Deal
top_signals.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio speaks to reporters on the progress of a deal with Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Buyer Says US Allows Ships Sanctioned Over Iran to Be Scrapped
top_signals.summary: GMS, a major buyer of ships and offshore vessels for recycling, says it has received the first US permit to purchase carriers sanctioned over Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Opening remarks by President von der Leyen at the EU-Mexico Summit
top_signals.summary:
